name: mostAsFsEnableEx, mostAsFsDisableEx
title: mostAsFsEnableEx, mostAsFsDisableEx
description: mostAsFsEnableEx() makes the function service available for a function block. Furthermore mostAsFsEnableEx() enables the functions <FktIDs>, <Notification> and <NotificationCheck> of the given function block for the notification service.
mostAsFsDisableEx() disables the function service for a function block.
